problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: If Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure is applied to at, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
